byte_len.description: Byte length inside the artifact file.

byte_offset.description: Byte offset inside the artifact file.

channels.description: Number of channels in the artifact view.

encoding.description: PCM encoding for the prepared audio.

frame_count.description: Number of frames in the view.

id.description: Stable artifact id referenced by request payloads.

path.description: Filesystem path to the prepared artifact.

ByteLengthV2.description: Byte length inside a prepared artifact file.

ByteOffsetV2.description: Byte offset inside a prepared artifact file.

ChannelCountV2.description: Number of channels in a prepared audio artifact.

FrameCountV2.description: Number of audio frames in a prepared artifact.

PreparedAudioEncodingV2.description: PCM encoding used for prepared audio artifacts.

SampleRateHzV2.description: Audio sample rate in Hz carried by prepared artifacts.

WorkerArtifactIdV2.description: Stable identifier for one prepared worker artifact.

WorkerArtifactPathV2.description: Filesystem path to a prepared worker artifact.
